approaches.title: Generate sequential numbers by length and starting digit
approaches.summary: Constructs candidates dynamically by tracking the digit length and leading digit, then filters candidates against the bounds.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial dynamic generation of sequential-digit candidates across valid lengths and starting digits.

approaches.title: Filter a precomputed list
approaches.summary: Uses a hardcoded ordered list of every possible sequential-digit number and retains values within the requested range.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces dynamic generation with a precomputed array followed by range filtering.
